industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Prime Road Power Public Company Limited
summary: Prime Road Power Public Company Limited engages in the generation and distribution of electricity from solar energy in Thailand and internationally. It also constructs power plants. The company has a total installed capacity of 294.7 megawatts, including 132.2 megawatts in Thailand, 68.2 megawatts in Japan, 16.2 megawatts in Taiwan, and 78.0 megawatts in Cambodia. It serves individuals, corporations, government agencies, and state-owned enterprises. Prime Road Power Public Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
